query:
UPDATE contacts 
SET linkedinHeadline = 'Procurement Manager at Acciona (title may be stale — references Pattullo Bridge project in Canada, but email domain is acciona.com.au and company match to Alkimos Desalination is valid)'
WHERE id = 930070 AND rejectionReason IS NULL
